full_text:
Yang Song 楊松
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Song (楊松). Vassal of Zhang Lu. Known to be greedy, he betrayed Zhang Lu. Yang Song is a fictional character. Yang Song was affiliated with Zhang Lu. Yang Song lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
